site.legalDescription: -- TBD: King County Recorder via iMap (gis.kingcounty.gov) by APN -- Subdivision / Block / Lot from recorded plat map
site.notes: VACANT LOT — no structure. Assessed land value $116,000; total assessed value = land only (no improvement value) per city-data.com 2016 tax record. Owner: Ernest E Rensink & Elizabeth M Rensink. Owner ALSO owns adjacent 12853 175th Ave SE (same owners per city-data) — potential combined-parcel development opportunity (~30,000 SF total). Water: Water District connection. Sewer: Private (likely septic — verify with KC Public Health). Street: Public, paved. | PIN/APN 7229900345 — confirmed 2026-04-15 via KC GIS bbox spatial query; polygon area ~15,024 SF matches recorded 15,029 SF; centroid at 47.486470, -122.107315. Verify in KC eReal Property (blue.kingcounty.gov/assessor) for full legal description and ownership chain. | lotWidth 114 ft × lotDepth 132 ft — GIS-measured from polygon vertices (2026-04-15); not estimated. lotSF 15,029 from city-data.com tax record. | TBD - C: All zoning standards are from Renton Municipal Code (RMC) 4-2-110A Table — verify current values at codepublishing.com/WA/Renton. Ordinance 6161 (June 2025) added middle housing (HB 1110 compliance): up to 4 units per lot allowed outright; up to 6 with affordable housing bonus. Types: duplexes, triplexes, fourplexes, townhouses, stacked flats, courtyard apts. Height and setbacks unchanged for middle housing. Corner lot: not confirmed — verify if 175th Ave SE is the only frontage or if there is a cross-street. | TBD - C2: Zoning designation confirmed as R-4 from neighborhood property search; verify exact zone code via Renton iMap (gismaps.rentonwa.gov) or Renton CED permit portal. Confirm lot is within City of Renton limits (not unincorporated KC). | TBD - D: All overlay zones unconfirmed — verify via Renton iMap and external sources listed below. | TBD - E: Fees — City of Renton permit fee schedule (rentonwa.gov/permits). WA has no NEF. Impact fees and utility connection fees via Renton CED. Permit center: (425) 430-7200. | TBD - G: Inspector contacts — City of Renton Development Services (425) 430-7200. | TBD - H: Coordinates from USCB geocoder (47.487244, -122.107018) — verify lat/lng by right-clicking lot center in Google Maps. Rotation: estimate from aerial. Parcel polygon: extract from KC iMap if irregular.

inspectors.name: Building Inspector
inspectors.val: City of Renton Permit Services — (425) 430-7200 (main CED/Development Services) | (425) 430-7215 (permit services direct) | (425) 430-7202 (inspection scheduling) | 1055 S Grady Way, Renton WA 98057 | permitting.rentonwa.gov

inspectors.name: Structural
inspectors.val: City of Renton Permit Services — (425) 430-7200 (same counter)

inspectors.name: Grading / Civil
inspectors.val: City of Renton Public Works — (425) 430-7200 | route through Permit Services; geotechnical review required per RMC 4-3-050 for vacant lot development

planningAreas.name: COMPREHENSIVE PLAN AREA
planningAreas.val: Residential Low Density (RLD) — City of Renton 2024 Comprehensive Plan (eff. Jan 1, 2025, covers 2025–2044). R-4 zone implements RLD designation per RMC 4-2-010. Source: RMC 4-2-010; rentonwa.gov 2024 Comp Plan (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: LAND USE DESIGNATION
planningAreas.val: Residential Low Density (RLD) — 4 du/net acre base; middle housing (up to 4 units) per Ord. 6161 (June 2025). Source: RMC 4-2-010; Renton 2024 Comp Plan (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: CITY LIMITS
planningAreas.val: Within City of Renton — APN 7229900345 confirmed via KC GIS spatial query (2026-04-15); PIN in 7229 series is City of Renton parcels. Verify via Renton iMap (gismaps.rentonwa.gov) if needed.

planningAreas.name: TRANSIT PRIORITY AREA
planningAreas.val: Not in TPA — East Renton Highlands at 175th Ave SE has no high-frequency transit within 0.5 mi. No Sound Transit, BRT, or RapidRide line serves this area. Nearest transit center ~6 mi west (downtown Renton). Source: King County Metro route maps (2026-04-15).

planningAreas.name: URBAN GROWTH AREA (UGA)
planningAreas.val: Yes -- Renton is within King County UGA

planningAreas.name: MIDDLE HOUSING (HB 1110)
planningAreas.val: Yes -- Renton adopted Ord. 6161 (June 2025); up to 4 units per lot outright in R-4

overlayZones.name: AIRPORT INFLUENCE AREA
overlayZones.val: Likely no formal overlay — Renton Municipal Airport (RNT) ~6.5 mi west; FAR Part 77 transitional surfaces do not impose height restrictions on SFR at this distance. BFI (Boeing Field) ~8 mi NW; 65 DNL contour does not extend to 98059. Confirm RMC 4-3-020 airport height boundary map for east Renton does not reach 175th Ave SE. FAA OE/AAA filing only required for structures ≥~70–100 ft AGL. Source: Wikipedia RNT; RMC 4-3-020; FAA airport data (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: COASTAL / SHORELINE
overlayZones.val: No — inland location; ~0.9 mi north of Soos Creek; no SMA shoreline designation. Soos Creek main channel ~1.5–2 mi south/southwest. Source: WA Ecology Coastal Atlas (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: VERY HIGH FIRE HAZARD
overlayZones.val: No — East Renton Highlands is suburban with no WUI designation. WA DNR Wildfire Hazard draft map (not finalized 2026-04) does not designate standard suburban King County parcels. Source: WA DNR Wildfire Hazard and Risk Mapping draft (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: SEISMIC / FAULT ZONE
overlayZones.val: Seismic Hazard Area — site at 47.486°N is south of Seattle Fault main trace (~47.61°N); footwall zone, significant seismic hazard from both Seattle Fault (M7+) and Cascadia Subduction Zone. Elevated East Renton Highlands terrain = lower liquefaction risk vs Cedar River valley. RMC 4-3-050 requires geotechnical report if designated seismic hazard soils present. Source: WA DNR GM-41 liquefaction susceptibility; Renton Hazard Mitigation Plan; RMC 4-3-050 (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: FEMA FLOOD ZONE
overlayZones.val: Likely Zone X — elevated East Renton Highlands; outside Cedar River, Green River, and Soos Creek floodplains at this location. Confirm at msc.fema.gov or KC iMap (gismaps.kingcounty.gov/parcelviewer2/). Source: KC Flood Control District; FEMA MSC (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: CRITICAL AREAS (RMC 4-3)
overlayZones.val: CAR REQUIRED — vacant lot in Soos Creek watershed area (Soos Creek ~1.5–2 mi S). Wetland delineation may be required if hydric soils, drainage swales, or ponding present on the vacant parcel. Submit environmental checklist at pre-application meeting per RMC 4-3-050. Source: Soos Creek Water and Sewer District; King County wetlands GIS; RMC 4-3-050 (2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: WELLHEAD PROTECTION
overlayZones.val: TBD — East Renton area has some Zone 1/2 wellhead protection areas; verify via Renton iMap (gismaps.rentonwa.gov) wellhead protection layer. Soos Creek Water and Sewer District serves this address. Source: Soos Creek W&S District (sooscreek.com); Renton iMap (2026-04-15).

devRef.source: Census geocoder lat/lng; city-data.com 2016 tax record (lot SF, owner, land value); Renton Ord. 6161 middle housing (June 2025); RMC 4-2-110A (R-4 standards from knowledge base — verify at codepublishing.com/WA/Renton).
devRef.note_dimensions: Width and depth are rough estimates only (80 × 188 ≈ 15,040 SF). Confirm from KC Assessor parcel map or surveyor before any design work.

buildableEnvelope.note: 40% max lot coverage = 15,029 × 0.40 = 6,012 SF max footprint. Actual buildable zone within setbacks ~70 ft × 153 ft = 10,710 SF (usable area, not max coverage).

imperviousLimit.note: 15,029 × 0.55 = 8,266 SF max impervious total (structures + driveway + hardscape).

units.note: R-4 base = 1 SFR. After Ord. 6161 (HB 1110, June 2025): 4 units per lot outright; 6 with affordable bonus. Types: duplex, triplex, fourplex, townhouse, stacked flat, courtyard apt.

adjacentParcel.owner: Ernest E Rensink & Elizabeth M Rensink (same owner)
adjacentParcel.note: Combined development of both parcels (~30,058 SF total) could unlock larger unit count and simplified site layout. Requires lot line adjustment or joint permit. Verify APN of 12853 via KC Assessor.

_schema: legacy-projectbook -- migrate to MPL schema when site becomes active
